---
title: "Projection municipale — `r if(!is.null(params$timestamp)) format(params$timestamp, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S') else ''`"
subtitle: "Dernière mise à jour : `r format(params$timestamp, '%d/%m %H:%M:%S')`"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: cosmo
params:
  timestamp: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```


```{r global, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(flexdashboard)
library(DT)
library(gt)
library(scales)

source("build/modele.R")

res_k5 <- run_model_selon_k(
  archfile = archfile_5
)

res_k9 <- run_model_selon_k(
  archfile = archfile_9
)

out_k5 <- get_outputs_from_res(res_k5)
out_k9 <- get_outputs_from_res(res_k9)
```

# k = 5

## Row

### Bureaux observés

```{r, echo=FALSE}
valueBox(
  value = out_k5[["nb bureaux observés"]],
  caption = "Bureaux observés",
  icon = "fa-check"
)
```

## Row
### Scores par liste

```{r}
out_k5[["scores par liste"]] |>
  DT::datatable()
```


### Résultats projetés

```{r}
out_k5[["résultats"]] |>
  DT::datatable()
```

## Row
### Projection par bureau

```{r}
datatable(
  out_k5[["projection par bureau"]],
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10,
    scrollX = TRUE
  )
)
```

# k = 9

## Row

### Bureaux observés

```{r}
valueBox(
  value = out_k9[["nb bureaux observés"]],
  caption = "Bureaux observés",
  icon = "fa-check"
)
```

## Row
### Scores par liste

```{r}
out_k9[["scores par liste"]] |>
  DT::datatable()
```


### Résultats projetés

```{r}
out_k9[["résultats"]] |>
  DT::datatable()
```

## Row
### Projection par bureau

```{r}
datatable(
  out_k9[["projection par bureau"]],
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10,
    scrollX = TRUE
  )
)
```

# Comparaison

## Row

### Scores comparés

```{r}
comp_scores <- 
  list("k_5"=out_k5,
       "k_9"=out_k9) |> 
  map(.f = ~.[["scores par liste"]]) |> 
  bind_rows(.id = "k")

comp_scores |>
  select(-voix_proj) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = k, values_from = score, names_prefix = "score_") |> 
  gt()
```

### Résultats comparés

```{r}
comp_res <- 
  list("k_5"=out_k5,
       "k_9"=out_k9) |> 
  map(.f = ~.[["résultats"]]) |> 
  bind_rows(.id = "k")

comp_res |> 
  select(-exprimes) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = k, values_from = voix_proj, names_prefix = "voix_") |> 
  gt()
```
